name: Ransomware: Mass File Encryption — Known Ransomware Extensions
description: Detects mass creation of files with known ransomware encryption extensions (.locked, .encrypted, .ryuk, .conti, .lockbit, .blackcat, .wncry). Threshold of 20 within 1 minute indicates encryption sweep in progress. MITRE T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact.
query:
file where event.type == "creation" and
  file.extension in ("locked", "encrypted", "enc", "ryuk", "conti", "lockbit", "blackcat", "wncry", "ryk", "ransom", "WNCRYPT", "wcry")

name: Ransomware: Shadow Copy Deletion — Recovery Inhibition
description: Detects vssadmin, wmic, or bcdedit commands used to delete volume shadow copies or disable recovery — the signature pre-encryption step in LockBit, Ryuk, Conti, and BlackCat ransomware. MITRE T1490 - Inhibit System Recovery.
query:
process where event.type == "start" and (
  (process.name == "vssadmin.exe" and process.args : ("delete", "shadows")) or
  (process.name == "wmic.exe" and process.command_line like~ "*shadowcopy delete*") or
  (process.name == "bcdedit.exe" and process.args : ("/set") and process.command_line like~ "*recoveryenabled*no*") or
  (process.name == "wbadmin.exe" and process.args : ("delete", "catalog", "backup"))
)

name: Ransomware: Backup Service Stopped (Pre-Encryption Phase)
description: Detects 'net stop' or 'sc stop' targeting Windows Backup, VSS, or SQL Server services — the Ryuk/Conti pre-encryption phase that disables recovery services before deploying encryption. MITRE T1489 - Service Stop.
query:
process where event.type == "start" and
  process.name in ("net.exe", "net1.exe", "sc.exe") and
  process.args == "stop" and
  process.command_line like~ ("*backup*", "*vss*", "*sqlserver*", "*MSSQLSERVER*", "*BackupExec*", "*Veeam*")

name: Ransomware: Ransom Note File Created
description: Detects creation of files matching common ransom note naming patterns (README, HOW_TO_DECRYPT, RECOVER_FILES). This fires after encryption is complete and data is already at risk. MITRE T1486.
query:
file where event.type == "creation" and
  file.name like~ ("README*.txt", "HOW_TO_DECRYPT*", "RECOVER_FILES*", "RANSOM_NOTE*", "!!!_IMPORTANT_!!!*", "_README_*", "DECRYPT_INSTRUCTIONS*")

name: Ransomware: Suspicious PowerShell Dropper (Encoded/Hidden/Download)
description: EQL sequence: PowerShell launched with EncodedCommand, bypass, or hidden flags that then spawns a network connection — the classic ransomware dropper chain. MITRE T1059.001, T1027.
query:
sequence by process.entity_id with maxspan=30s
  [process where event.type == "start" and
    process.name : ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe") and
    process.command_line like~ ("*-EncodedCommand*", "*-enc *", "*-e *", "*-bypass*", "*hidden*", "*IEX*", "*Invoke-Expression*", "*DownloadString*", "*WebClient*")]
  [network where event.type == "start" and
    not destination.ip : ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "169.254.*")]

name: Ransomware: Mass Process Termination (AV/EDR Kill Phase)
description: Detects 10+ consecutive taskkill /f executions within 30 seconds — ransomware operators systematically kill AV, EDR, and backup agents immediately before deploying encryption. MITRE T1562.001 - Disable or Modify Tools.
query:
process where event.type == "start" and
  process.name == "taskkill.exe" and
  process.args : "/f"
